# DataDetector.Match.SemanticDetails.PostalAddress

**Structure**

A match that the data detector determines represents a postal address.

## Declaration

```swift
struct PostalAddress
```

## Discussion

The data detector attempts to populate as much of the postal address as possible. The properties the detector supports include:

- [doc://com.apple.datadetection/documentation/DataDetection/DataDetector/Match/SemanticDetails/PostalAddress/fullAddress] contains the full string of the address and may contain more than just the sum of the individual components.
- [doc://com.apple.datadetection/documentation/DataDetection/DataDetector/Match/SemanticDetails/PostalAddress/street] may contain the street component of the address.
- [doc://com.apple.datadetection/documentation/DataDetection/DataDetector/Match/SemanticDetails/PostalAddress/city] may contain the city component of the address.
- [doc://com.apple.datadetection/documentation/DataDetection/DataDetector/Match/SemanticDetails/PostalAddress/state] may contain the state component of the address.
- [doc://com.apple.datadetection/documentation/DataDetection/DataDetector/Match/SemanticDetails/PostalAddress/postalCode] may contain the postal code component of the address.
- [doc://com.apple.datadetection/documentation/DataDetection/DataDetector/Match/SemanticDetails/PostalAddress/region] may contain the region component of the address, for example, United States or France.
- [doc://com.apple.datadetection/documentation/DataDetection/DataDetector/Match/SemanticDetails/PostalAddress/regionCode] may contain the ISO region code of the address.
- [doc://com.apple.datadetection/documentation/DataDetection/DataDetector/Match/SemanticDetails/PostalAddress/label] may contain a value suitable to populate a label when creating a contact.

## Properties that detail parts of a postal address

- **fullAddress**: A string that contains the full string of the address.
- **street**: An optional string that may contain the street component of the address.
- **city**: An optional string that may contain the city component of the address.
- **state**: An optional string that may contain the state component of the address.
- **postalCode**: An optional string that may contain the postal code component of the address.
- **region**: An optional string that may contain the region component of the address.
- **regionCode**: An optional string that may contain the standard ISO 3166 region code of the address.
- **label**: An optional string that may contain a value suitable to populate a label when creating a contact.

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
